Clem is a very nice ultra support but won't help you too much with survivability

If you’re getting Kathigu-Ra, she needs E3 mandatory for her smoothness of gameplay, and scaling for damage. 

Castor is ok E0, and amazing E3. Pollux is alright E3. Clem is amazing E3. Corpo is solid E3. Inferno only for D-Tide. Doreslain is a character that exists. Pickman is noice E2.

If you switch Awakeners, then WoDs would be different. However, consistently in story, until Arc 2, you want to run the R/Brown WoDs, “Frenzy” “Gluttony” and “Emerge”(I see Frenzy missing). “Frenzy” is really strong because Cursed Relics can be bought in shops.
You shouldn’t be running 4 “Deux Ex Machina” sets, as there are better Covs. However, I am unsure which ones you have access to.
i'm still at chapter 6 and have 44 lvl, so this sets is temporary

The shop should have two rather cheap all around usuable Covs. One called “SteppenWolf” and another called “Scarlet (Something)”. The SteppenWolf is a generic Base Dmg 20% Cov. The “Scarlet” gives 30% Crit Rate on Posse.
You should be able to farm “Burial Grounds” which is a DR Cov which can further help with survival.
However, you need a better comp(with defensives options), and change WoDs, and invest in your Awakeners.
